notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the xmlrpc-c SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.8. It addresses 2 CVEs: CVE-2023-52425, CVE-2024-45491.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
